scripts.build: npm run build -w @vnu/shared-types && npm run build -w @vnu/exam-package-kit && npm run build -w @vnu/api && npm run build -w @vnu/student && npm run build -w @vnu/proctor
scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-prepare.mjs && concurrently -n API,Student,Proctor -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:student" "npm run dev:proctor"
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n API,Student,Proctor -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:student" "npm run dev:proctor"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vnu/shared-types && npm run test -w @vnu/exam-package-kit && npm run test -w @vnu/api
